ogTitle: Yandoo Creek vs Yangebup: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yandoo Creek and Yangebup.
heading: Yandoo Creek vs Yangebup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yandoo Creek, Western Australia and Yangebup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yandoo Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Yangebup (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yandoo Creek or Yangebup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yandoo Creek has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Yangebup scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yandoo Creek scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Yangebup scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yandoo Creek or Yangebup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yandoo Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
